title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Reviewed first external-consumer UAT run of meeting-ingest (Codex in HTV-IQ-DataAnalytics). Engine contract held; friction was all in the provider-response layer: schema guessed and discovered rejection-by-rejection, fail-fast validation forcing four retry round-trips, and the low-confidence mtime date noted but not escalated before ID minting. Captured full findings as cap_20260718T220148Z_a28fa2b4. Queued the session provider response contract hardening block as the next work block, ahead of Layer 5A.
next_actions: Next work block (before Layer 5A): (1) embed the full provider-response contract - filled example or JSON schema - in the phase-1 request payload and skill docs; (2) aggregate provider-response validation errors into one report and add a validate-response pre-flight command; (3) add a skill/AGENTS.md protocol step to confirm the occurrence date via --meeting-date when phase-1 date_confidence is low. Then Layer 5A schema 1.1 and reviewed identity. Backlog: stale-handoff cleanup command, word-boundary slug truncation, repair-date for the three flagged artifacts plus mtg-20260718-aa2fd13f in HTV repo once dates are confirmed.
continuation_hint: Next: Next work block (before Layer 5A): (1) embed the full provider-response contract - filled example or JSON schema - in the phase-1 request payload and skill docs; (2) aggregate provider-response validation errors into one report and add a validate-response pre-flight command; (3) add a skill/AGENTS.md protocol step to confirm the occurrence date via --meeting-date when phase-1 date_confidence is low.
